title: Penyelamat Bumi 🌍
blurb: A 3D board game about sustainability & the climate emergency — play together from kids to grown-ups, learning while you play. Roll the dice, collect Planet Points, answer eco-quizzes. Runs right in the browser.

title: Ular Tangga 3D 🎲
blurb: The classic Snakes & Ladders board game, reborn in 3D — play together from kids to grown-ups on one screen. Roll the tumbling dice, climb the ladders, dodge the snakes, first to 100 wins. Runs right in the browser.

title: Robot Rapi 🤖✨
blurb: A 3D file-organization game — help a friendly robot tidy its data warehouse. Tap files into the right folders, learn folders-inside-folders and clear naming, then clean up a messy computer. Play together, kids to grown-ups. Runs right in the browser.

title: Car City or Transit Shift?
blurb: Deep-research report on Perth's transport orientation: modal share data, road vs rail investment ($13.4B vs $4.8B), urban sprawl, political economy, and what METRONET is actually changing.

title: The AI Boom, Mapped
blurb: Deep-research map of the US AI-stock boom: 44 companies across 8 layers, the hyperscaler money web, live stock data, and where the next multibagger might hide.

title: How to Code for Non-Coders
blurb: Learn coding fundamentals in a practical, beginner-first way.

title: Carbon Accounting
blurb: Understand emissions measurement and reporting with practical examples.

title: Life Cycle Assessment
blurb: Go from LCA basics to ISO-aligned practice with real-world examples.

title: Clothing, Textiles & Our World
blurb: Follow the clothing supply chain and learn about impact and circular solutions.

title: Disaster Management Fundamentals
blurb: Learn the disaster management cycle, risk basics, and preparedness essentials.

title: Bridging the AI Gap
blurb: Build AI literacy and useful workflows for real-world work.

title: Claude Without Burning Tokens
blurb: Save tokens with smarter context, prompts, and tool workflows.

title: Rumah Harmonis – Architecture
blurb: Design a tropical home that unites climate science, Feng Shui spatial wisdom, and Islamic values.

title: Build Your AI Agent Bot
blurb: Launch a Telegram AI bot on a VPS with OpenRouter, systemd, and production-ready workflows.

title: Design Principles: Applied Aesthetics
blurb: Master the science of making things look good – contrast, composition, color, and typography with visual examples and exercises.

title: Reading Perth – Architecture by Rail
blurb: Trace Perth's buildings from the 1829 Swan River Colony to today – a train-line field guide to spotting and understanding the city's architecture.

title: The Proof Expedition
blurb: An 8-camp climb into abstract mathematics: break a lying prime formula, topple infinite dominoes, check into Hilbert's Hotel and learn how mathematicians achieve absolute certainty. Based on a free 698-page CMU book.

title: Proof Expedition · Base Camp
blurb: The full ascent: 8 interactive expeditions covering the entire 698-page CMU abstract-math book, one chapter each — induction, sets, logic, relations, infinity and counting. Expedition 1 (7 trail days, 7 labs) is open now.

title: Feifelusiac Safe Area Calculator
blurb: Quickly calculate safe area values with practical controls.

title: Life Expectancy Risk Calculator
blurb: Select your risk factors and see how they affect your estimated lifespan.

title: AU vs ID Specialist Doctor Dashboard
blurb: Side-by-side comparison of specialist availability across Australia and Indonesia.

title: Climate Risk & ESG Data: A Portfolio Briefing
blurb: Brief yourself on three climate-risk / ESG data projects — WA cyclone trends, SW WA rainfall decline, and AASB S2 disclosure readiness — and learn to speak about them confidently in a Perth consulting interview.

title: The Cash Experiment: Economics of Direct Giving
blurb: What actually happens when you give poor people money unconditionally? A deep dive into the Egger et al. 2022 Kenya RCT, the $2.50 local multiplier, zero-inflation result, and what global UBI pilots reveal about poverty, agency, and development.

title: AASB S2 Decoded: Climate-related Disclosures
blurb: A plain-English, fun-to-read field guide to the entire AASB S2 standard — the four pillars (governance, strategy, risk management, metrics & targets), scenario analysis, Scope 1/2/3 emissions, the full reporting rulebook and the reasoning behind every Australian tweak. No shortcuts.
